headline: Principal Scientist at Adobe focused on AEM, cloud-native delivery, Kubernetes, and agentic applications
title: Principal Scientist
location: A Coruña, Spain / Los Angeles, CA
confidenceNote: Identity, role, Adobe affiliation, and technical focus are confirmed by his Sessionize profile and personal blog; location varies between profile sources.
bioMarkdown: Principal Scientist at Adobe Experience Manager working across software automation, cloud-native delivery, Kubernetes, progressive delivery, and agentic applications. Longtime open source contributor, Apache Software Foundation member, and author of the Jenkins Kubernetes plugin.

primary.label: Sessionize speaker profile
primary.note: Lists Carlos as Principal Scientist at Adobe, with expertise in software automation, agentic applications, Kubernetes, DevOps, and progressive delivery.

primary.label: Personal blog about page
primary.note: Personal site describes him as an Apache member and open source advocate focused on software development tools, cloud computing, DevOps, and startups.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Search result confirms Principal Scientist at Adobe and Apache Software Foundation membership.

secondary.label: FOSDEM 2026 speaker page
secondary.note: Conference bio corroborates Adobe AEM role, Jenkins Kubernetes plugin authorship, Apache membership, and Kubernetes/Jenkins/Maven contributions.

secondary.label: Software Engineering Daily episode
secondary.note: Interview page summarizes his Adobe AEM work and open source background.

headline: Principal, Data Science at Summit Partners, advising growth companies on analytics, data strategy, and AI readiness
title: Principal, Data Science
confidenceNote: Summit Partners team page confirms current title, role, location, and prior experience; speaker and book sources corroborate data leadership background.
bioMarkdown: Data science principal at Summit Partners working with portfolio companies on analytics, data strategy, decision-making, and product improvement. Previously built or led analytics teams at Strava, Okta, and Zynga, and authored O'Reilly's SQL for Data Analysis.

primary.label: Summit Partners team profile
primary.note: Official profile lists her as Principal, Data Science in Summit's Peak Performance Group and describes her portfolio-company data and analytics work.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Search result confirms Summit Partners affiliation and San Francisco-area location.

primary.label: O'Reilly book page
primary.note: Publisher page identifies Cathy Tanimura as author of SQL for Data Analysis.

secondary.label: AI & Big Data Expo speaker profile
secondary.note: Speaker bio corroborates Summit role, prior Strava/Okta/Zynga analytics leadership, and SQL book authorship.

secondary.label: Summit Partners AI data strategy article
secondary.note: Shows her current thought leadership on AI's impact on data strategy for growth companies.

headline: Head of Technology at VTEX working on GenAI platforms, AI agents, developer platforms, and digital commerce
title: Head of Technology
confidenceNote: LinkedIn snippets and posts strongly match Cesar Caixeta Ferreira at VTEX and his AI-agent work; New York location is taken from participant-provided data rather than independently confirmed.
bioMarkdown: Technology leader at VTEX focused on AI-native commerce platforms, agentic applications, and developer productivity. Recent posts describe work on VTEX AI Workspace, multi-agent architectures, and generative AI's impact on software development.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Search result lists Cesar Caixeta Ferreira as Head of Technology at VTEX, with GenAI platforms, AI agents, developer platforms, and MIT MBA in the headline.

primary.label: LinkedIn post on VTEX AI Workspace
primary.note: Describes the VTEX AI Workspace release, AI strategy, agentic application platform architecture, and digital commerce agents.

primary.label: LinkedIn post on AI-native software
primary.note: Discusses senior VTEX engineering leadership collaboration on AI-native software, AgenticOps, and multi-agent architectures.

secondary.label: LinkedIn post on VTEX Day GenAI talk
secondary.note: Corroborates his public focus on generative AI and software engineering practices such as spec-driven development.

secondary.label: LinkedIn post on MIT graduation
secondary.note: Corroborates MIT Sloan MBA background referenced in his public headline.

headline: CTO at Tivly with AI-native engineering leadership experience across insurtech and regulated industries
title: Chief Technology Officer
confidenceNote: LinkedIn search result and The Org profile align on Chad Nagle as Tivly CTO; location is based on participant-provided Duxbury and LinkedIn's broader Greater Boston signal.
bioMarkdown: CTO at Tivly leading engineering and technical governance. Background spans agile transformation, IT governance, program leadership, and regulated environments including insurtech, healthcare, genomics, and defense.
